caption: A woman with short dark hair, wearing a dark blazer over a white top, stands before a projected presentation screen. She holds a tablet or a folder in her hands, looking down at it as she presents. To her right, the back of a person's head is visible, wearing a green beanie. The projection behind her displays a complex layout of images and text, including the words "experience." and "data", as well as the page marker "Page 2 of 15". The screen contains various diagrams, technical images, and a portrait of a person. Across the sequence, the woman shifts her gaze slightly, looking from her notes toward the audience and then back down, while her posture remains relatively stable. The background remains a neutral-colored wall, and the lighting is consistent throughout the scene.
